name: The Cow's Whisper
blurb: Something glints in the grass where a cow once stood.

stages.description: While butchering a cow you found a small bronze trinket buried under the hide. It feels older than it should. Show it to Robert at the shop in Lumtown.

Robert says the trinket is a lockmaker's mark from a guild that fell two centuries ago. He thinks more relics might be tucked away in old chests scattered through the countryside. Bring him three relics of any kind.
You have the relics. Return to Robert and let him examine them.
